message:
style(benches): add explicit Criterion Bencher type annotations across all benchmarks

Adds explicit |b: &mut criterion::Bencher| type annotations to closure
parameters throughout all 16 benchmark files. This prevents type
inference ambiguity when the Criterion API evolves and makes the bench
closures self-documenting about their expected signature.

Affected benchmarks: cancel_drain_bench, cancel_trace_bench,
egraph_benchmark, geodesic_benchmark, golden_output,
homology_benchmark, methodology_baselines, phase0_baseline,
protocol_benchmark, raptorq_benchmark, reactor_benchmark,
scheduler_benchmark, scheduler_browser_bench, spork_baseline,
timer_wheel, tracing_overhead.

The timer_wheel benchmark received the most changes as every bench
function closure was annotated. No behavioral changes — purely
mechanical type annotation additions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
